data.title: KIRK FRANKLIN HONORED WITH SOUNDEXCHANGE HALL OF FAME AWARD
data.description: In recent news from Washington on April 22, 2026, it was announced that Kirk Franklin, a prominent figure in contemporary gospel music, has received the prestigious SoundExchange Hall of Fame Award. This accolade signifies his remarkable achievement as one of the top-streamed artists throughout the organization's extensive 20-year legacy. Franklin's exceptional success in the music industry has solidified his position as an iconic figure, with an impressive digital footprint that has resonated with audiences worldwide. This recognition further cements his status as a trailblazer in gospel music, showcasing his enduring popularity and influence in the industry.

data.title: HURST Jaws of Life® Introduces Industry-First AI Technician with Captium™ IQ
data.description: Today, Hurst Jaws of Life® based in Shelby, North Carolina, on April 22, 2026, unveiled Captium™ IQ, the first of its kind AI-powered platform. This innovation is set to revolutionize aftermarket possibilities with diagnostics and services support. As a global frontrunner in rescue tool technology, the company aims to enhance its offerings with advanced technology.

data.title: Entergy to report first quarter 2026 financial results on April 29
data.description: The financial results for the first quarter of 2026 from Entergy will be released on April 29, 2026, before the market opens. The disclosure will be made by Drew Marsh, the chair and CEO, and Kimberly Fontan, the executive VP and CFO.

data.title: Visiting Angels Foundation Partners with Meals on Wheels America for Historic Donation
data.description: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, on April 22, 2026, the Visiting Angels Foundation revealed its most significant donation to date, amounting to $100,000. This substantial gift is a historic milestone for the non-profit entity associated with Visiting Angels, known for its exceptional home care services in the United States.

data.title: Grech RV Announces Partnership with Mike Thompson's RV, Expanding Luxury Presence Across Southern California
data.description: Luxury Sprinter camper van maker joins forces with a prominent RV dealer in California. Based in RIVERSIDE, Calif., on April 22, 2026, Grech RV, known for its high-end Class B motorhomes on the Mercedes-Benz Sprinter chassis, revealed a new partnership. This collaboration brings together top-tier expertise in crafting camper vans and an esteemed RV retailer in California.

data.title: Obesity Drugs Covered In Medicare Change. Questions Remain For Lilly, Novo.
data.description: In a recent development, CMS has shifted its position to announce the coverage of obesity drugs starting from July 1 until the conclusion of 2027. This change signifies a significant policy adjustment regarding Medicare coverage. It brings important implications for pharmaceutical companies like Lilly and Novo, raising uncertainties and opportunities in the market. The decision aims to address the pressing issue of obesity and its related health concerns, indicating a proactive approach by CMS in tackling this growing problem.

data.title: Google Cloud: New AI 'TPUs' Target Nvidia, Agentic Platform Debuts
data.description: During a recent cloud computing event, Google announced a shift in its AI processor approach. The technology giant's stock has seen an impressive growth of close to 8% in 2026. Google aims to introduce new AI 'TPUs' targeting Nvidia as part of its strategy. Additionally, a new platform called Agentic is set to debut, further showcasing Google's commitment to AI advancements. This information was originally reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Hits Two-Month High Amid Strategy Buys. Watch This Range, Analyst Says.
data.description: Due to a series of strategic acquisitions, a resurgence in ETF investment, and increased involvement by institutional investors, the price of bitcoin has surged past $78,000, reaching a two-month high. An analyst advises monitoring this price range closely for potential fluctuations.

data.title: Academy Asset Managements’ VETZ ETF Surpasses $100 Million in Assets Under Management, Advancing Investment Opportunities Supporting Veterans
data.description: Academy Asset Management, a veteran-owned institutional asset manager based in New York, is excited to announce that their Academy Veteran Bond ETF (NYSE Arca: VETZ) has exceeded $100 million in assets under management (AUM). This achievement is particularly significant given the current economic climate, with housing affordability being a major issue for American veterans. Factors such as escalating home prices, high mortgage rates, and the regular need for relocations contribute to obstacles in the path of service members looking to build sustainable wealth in the long run.

data.title: Nelson Connects Expands Workforce Solutions to Include Employer of Record, Independent Contractor Compliance, and Agent of Record Services
data.description: Nelson Connects, based in Petaluma, California, has announced an expansion of its workforce solutions. The company will now offer services such as Employer of Record, Independent Contractor Compliance, and Agent of Record. This move is expected to significantly impact their operations and serves as a strategic shift for the organization.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical's Q1 Beat Shows Robotic Surgery Growth Is Holding Up
data.description: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (NASDAQ: ISRG) saw a rise in its shares following the release of positive first-quarter results. Despite a challenging macro environment, the company exceeded expectations in Procedure and System revenues. Analysts at BTIG noted that Intuitive Surgical reported revenues of $2.770 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.50 per share, beating consensus estimates of $2.618 billion and $2.12 per share. Analyst Ryan Zimmerman reaffirmed a Buy rating and set a price target of $574 for the company, highlighting its leadership in the robotic surgery sector. Procedure revenues grew by 17%, surpassing Street projections of 14.6%, while System revenues contributed significantly to the revenue increase with procedure growth at 16% and a 39% increase in...For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Employee Engagement Holds Steady as Key Drivers Show Uneven Progress, McLean & Company Report Finds
data.description: According to the Employee Engagement Trends Report 2026 by McLean & Company, employee engagement and intent to stay saw little change in 2025. However, critical areas such as compensation, career development, collaboration, stress, and coaching received low scores, hindering improved business performance. The report reveals the need for addressing these aspects to enhance overall employee satisfaction and retention.
